# Art Appraisers Directory

Public directory of art appraiser profile and location pages.

## Public Machine-Readable Feeds
- Directory summary: https://art-appraisers-directory.appraisily.com/directory.json
- Appraiser profiles: https://art-appraisers-directory.appraisily.com/appraisers.json
- Location pages: https://art-appraisers-directory.appraisily.com/locations.json
- Sitemap: https://art-appraisers-directory.appraisily.com/sitemap.xml

## Per-Location Feeds
Each location page also has a compact JSON feed at /location/<slug>/index.json.

## Data Boundary
These feeds are generated from canonical public_site HTML and embedded Schema.org JSON-LD only.
They do not expose private discovery data, enrichment artifacts, or internal review artifacts.
